issues.detail: The instructions lack explicit error handling for common failure scenarios such as network failures or missing dependencies.
The skill is tightly coupled to GitHub Copilot and Node.js, limiting its applicability to other AI agents or environments.

scenarios.name: Bootstrap Squad in a new repo
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses the exact npm install -g @bradygaster/squad-cli, squad init, gh auth login, and copilot --agent squad --yolo sequence; baseline guesses the package name and commands and never invokes Copilot.

scenarios.name: Context hygiene + export to a teammate
scenarios.rationale: Treatment names squad nap (with --deep / --dry-run), squad doctor, and squad export/import — the three skill-specific commands; baseline gives generic agent-framework advice without these commands.
